notes: Kimi is not configured on this machine, and the installer/runtime profile is not wired yet.
Tether does not have a real first-class installer/runtime lane in this repo yet.
QVAC does not have a real first-class installer/runtime lane in this repo yet.

gates.command: supported Python clean venv plus pip install -e '.[dev]' plus import and entrypoint smoke
gates.notes: Used Python 3.11 because the machine default python3=3.9.6 is outside the declared project requirement.

gates.command: supported Python clean venv plus pip install -e '.[runtime,dev]' plus import and entrypoint smoke
gates.notes: Verified playwright import and entrypoints in the runtime extra profile.
Full repo lint gate on the current tree.
Full shard pack green on the current tree.
sdist and wheel build succeeded; setuptools still emits the existing project.license deprecation warning.
Focused rerun after the quote-coalescing and machine-read pre-gate fixes.
Thin wrapper over the existing gauntlet test. No new scoring logic added.

gates.command: python -m apps.nulla_api_server --bind 127.0.0.1 --port 18080 plus mixed workload concurrency probe at workers 1/2/4
gates.notes: workers=1 success=1.0 p50=4915.32ms; workers=2 success=1.0 p50=5219.84ms; workers=4 success=1.0 p50=5746.12ms.

failure_ledger.symptom: Fresh editable installs did not expose the relay runtime roots cleanly.
failure_ledger.root_cause: relay package markers were missing and setuptools discovery did not include relay*.
failure_ledger.remaining_risk: Low. New top-level packages still need packaging contract coverage to stay honest.

failure_ledger.symptom: Direct script execution failed before the wrapped proof lanes started.
failure_ledger.root_cause: ops/llm_eval.py imported local modules before putting the repo root on sys.path.
failure_ledger.remaining_risk: Low. The wrapper is still thin and depends on run_local_acceptance semantics staying stable.

failure_ledger.reproduction_command: python -m apps.nulla_api_server --bind 127.0.0.1 --port 18080 plus mixed workload concurrency probe at workers 1/2/4
failure_ledger.symptom: Concurrent BTC fresh lookups degraded to unresolved-quote filler at workers 2 and 4.
failure_ledger.root_cause: Identical live quote requests were not coalesced, so the upstream crypto quote path flaked under concurrency.
failure_ledger.remaining_risk: Low to medium. This removed the observed stampede failure, but the lane still depends on external quote-source availability.

failure_ledger.symptom: Ordinary live-info and adaptive-research prompts were entering the machine-read planner instead of the fresh-info and web path.
failure_ledger.root_cause: apps.nulla_agent invoked the machine-read planner before a prompt-level pre-gate filtered unrelated requests.
failure_ledger.remaining_risk: Low. The pre-gate is intentionally cheap, so future machine-read expansion still needs regression tests for boundary prompts.

fix_ledger.summary: Added relay package markers and expanded packaging contract coverage so fresh editable installs and built artifacts expose the same relay roots.
fix_ledger.safety_notes: This only widened package discovery to the real runtime roots already used by source mode.

fix_ledger.summary: Made ops/llm_eval.py robust to direct script execution by inserting the repo root into sys.path before local imports.
fix_ledger.safety_notes: The import path change is local to the CLI wrapper and does not affect runtime routing logic.

fix_ledger.summary: Added short-TTL cached and in-flight coalescing for identical live quote requests so concurrent BTC lookups share one upstream fetch.
fix_ledger.safety_notes: The cache key is scoped to the resolved live-quote target and only caches successful quote objects for a short TTL.

fix_ledger.summary: Added a cheap prompt pre-gate so the machine-read planner only runs for real machine-spec and safe-directory prompts.
fix_ledger.safety_notes: The pre-gate narrows planner activation and reduces routing blast radius without loosening any write policy.

required_followups: Make Kimi a first-class installer runtime profile instead of a probe-only suggestion.
Add real first-class Tether and QVAC lanes or remove them from recommendation surfaces.
Stop overwriting first-red artifacts during reruns so the next green-loop keeps perfect before and after proof.
signoff.notes: All canonical top-level gates are green on the current tree. Core risk is no longer the local runtime or fresh lookup lane; it is report-discipline debt from overwritten first-red artifacts and the still-unfinished remote-provider product lanes.
